meaning: el koymak, ele geçirmek, esir almak

examples.sentence: The army managed to capture the city.

examples.meaning: On yıl sonra onu zar zor tanıdım.

examples.sentence: We hardly ever see each other now.

examples.meaning: 2019'da yurtdışına taşındı; o zamandan beri nadiren konuşuruz.

meaning: o zamandan beri sürekli, o zamandan bu yana

examples.sentence: I've been happy ever since we met.
So far, everything is going well.
examples.meaning: Şu ana kadar her şey yolunda gidiyor.

examples.sentence: Up to now, nobody has complained.

examples.sentence: Up till now, the plan has worked.
examples.meaning: Şu ana kadar plan işe yaradı.

examples.sentence: To date, we have raised ten thousand dollars.

examples.sentence: In the last month, sales have doubled.

examples.sentence: For the past year, I've studied English daily.

examples.sentence: She is out of town this week.

examples.meaning: Bütün hayatım boyunca doktor olmak istedim.

examples.sentence: For one second I thought it was a joke.

meaning: hayatı boyunca (süre + during + all one's life)

examples.sentence: Churchill preferred taking a nap for 1 hour during lunch time all his life.

examples.sentence: Our manager has worked really hard all his life.
